prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='FT_catboost', seasonality_champion='ONLY_FT_rf', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.81) and significant seasonality variance (0.73), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_catboost excels at trend tracking, ONLY_FT_rf dominates seasonal capture, while catboost leads overall RMSE. The combination of strong early horizon specialists (catboost) and late horizon specialists (ONLY_FT_catboost) suggests per-horizon selection could help, but the high disagreement and seasonality variance strongly favor DBA combination to leverage model diversity.

raw.pattern_analyst:
{
  "trend_champion": "FT_catboost",
  "seasonality_champion": "ONLY_FT_rf",
  "overall_champion": "catboost",
  "horizon_specialists": {"early": "catboost", "late": "ONLY_FT_catboost"},
  "tier1_models": ["catboost", "ONLY_FT_rf", "FT_rf", "rf", "ONLY_FT_catboost", "THETA", "NaiveMovingAverage", "ETS"],
  "tier2_models": ["CWT_rf", "ARIMA", "ONLY_DWT_catboost", "FT_svr", "DWT_rf", "ONLY_FT_svr", "DWT_svr", "ONLY_DWT_rf"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",
  "key_insights": {
    "rmse_spread_ratio": 0.8106,
    "high_disagreement": true,
    "high_seasonality_variance": true,
    "ytrue_trend_directions": ["up", "up", "down"]
  },
  "cot_narrative": "Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.81) and significant seasonality variance (0.73), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_catboost excels at trend tracking, ONLY_FT_rf dominates seasonal capture, while catboost leads overall RMSE. The combination of strong early horizon specialists (catboost) and late horizon specialists (ONLY_FT_catboost) suggests per-horizon selection could help, but the high disagreement and seasonality variance strongly favor DBA combination to leverage model diversity."
}
raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["dba_combination", "best_per_horizon_by_validation", "inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k4"],
  "params_overrides": {"inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25": {"shrinkage": 0.25, "top_k": 3}},
  "score_preset": "direction_focus",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=8 indicates strong per-horizon model diversity. High disagreement (relative_spread_mean extremely high, flags.high_disagreement=true) strongly favors DBA combination as recommended by pattern_analyst_insights.recommended_method_hint. With only n_windows=3, shrinkage is needed to prevent overfitting - inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25 provides moderate shrinkage. best_per_horizon_by_validation captures horizon-specific specialists (catboost early, ONLY_FT_catboost late). topk_mean_per_horizon_k4 adds robustness with k=4 selection. score_preset=direction_focus chosen because avg POCID=44.1 < 45 indicates low directional accuracy."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.81) and significant seasonality variance (0.73), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_catboost excels at trend tracking, ONLY_FT_rf dominates seasonal capture, while catboost leads overall RMSE. The combination of strong early horizon specialists (catboost) and late horizon specialists (ONLY_FT_catboost) suggests per-horizon selection could help, but the high disagreement and seasonality variance strongly favor DBA combination to leverage model diversity.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=8 indicates strong per-horizon model diversity. High disagreement (relative_spread_mean extremely high, flags.high_disagreement=true) strongly favors DBA combination as recommended by pattern_analyst_insights.recommended_method_hint. With only n_windows=3, shrinkage is needed to prevent overfitting - inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25 provides moderate shrinkage. best_per_horizon_by_validation captures horizon-specific specialists (catboost early, ONLY_FT_catboost late). topk_mean_per_horizon_k4 adds robustness with k=4 selection. score_preset=direction_focus chosen because avg POCID=44.1 < 45 indicates low directional accuracy.
